mapper.sql: id, invoice_id, invoice_no, order_no, model_no, quantity, barcode, customer_no, inventory_id, supplier_code, prod_country, imp_date, opt_code, order_type, warehouse_code, case_no, imp_type, remark, rohs, create_time, update_time, create_user, update_user, oversea_invoice_no, poNo, poItemNo
mapper.select:
select
distinct
from dbo.impdata
order by ${orderByClause}
mapper.insert: insert into dbo.impdata (id, invoice_id, invoice_no, order_no, model_no, quantity, barcode, customer_no, inventory_id, supplier_code, prod_country, imp_date, opt_code, order_type, warehouse_code, case_no, imp_type, remark, rohs, create_time, update_time, create_user, update_user, oversea_invoice_no, poNo, poItemNo) values (#{id,jdbcType=BIGINT}, #{invoiceId,jdbcType=BIGINT}, #{invoiceNo,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{orderNo,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{modelNo,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{quantity,jdbcType=INTEGER}, #{barcode,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{customerNo,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{inventoryId,jdbcType=BIGINT}, #{supplierCode,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{prodCountry,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{impDate,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, #{optCode,jdbcType=CHAR}, #{orderType,jdbcType=SMALLINT}, #{warehouseCode,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{caseNo,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{impType,jdbcType=SMALLINT}, #{remark,jdbcType=NVARCHAR}, #{rohs,jdbcType=CHAR}, #{createTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, #{updateTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, #{createUser,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{updateUser,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{overseaInvoiceNo,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{pono,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{poitemno,jdbcType=INTEGER})

insert into dbo.impdata
id,
invoice_id,
invoice_no,
order_no,
model_no,
quantity,
barcode,
customer_no,
inventory_id,
supplier_code,

oversea_invoice_no,
poNo,
poItemNo,

mapper.update:
update dbo.impdata
id = #{record.id,jdbcType=BIGINT},
invoice_id = #{record.invoiceId,jdbcType=BIGINT},
invoice_no = #{record.invoiceNo,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
order_no = #{record.orderNo,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
model_no = #{record.modelNo,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
quantity = #{record.quantity,jdbcType=INTEGER},
barcode = #{record.barcode,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
customer_no = #{record.customerNo,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
inventory_id = #{record.inventoryId,jdbcType=BIGINT},
supplier_code = #{record.supplierCode,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
prod_country = #{record.prodCountry,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
imp_date = #{record.impDate,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP},
opt_code = #{record.optCode,jdbcType=CHAR},
order_type = #{record.orderType,jdbcType=SMALLINT},
warehouse_code = #{record.warehouseCode,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
case_no = #{record.caseNo,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
imp_type = #{record.impType,jdbcType=SMALLINT},
remark = #{record.remark,jdbcType=NVARCHAR},
rohs = #{record.rohs,jdbcType=CHAR},
create_time = #{record.createTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP},
update_time = #{record.updateTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP},
create_user = #{record.createUser,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
update_user = #{record.updateUser,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
oversea_invoice_no = #{record.overseaInvoiceNo,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
poNo = #{record.pono,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
poItemNo = #{record.poitemno,jdbcType=INTEGER},

update dbo.impdata set id = #{record.id,jdbcType=BIGINT}, invoice_id = #{record.invoiceId,jdbcType=BIGINT}, invoice_no = #{record.invoiceNo,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, order_no = #{record.orderNo,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, model_no = #{record.modelNo,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, quantity = #{record.quantity,jdbcType=INTEGER}, barcode = #{record.barcode,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, customer_no = #{record.customerNo,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, inventory_id = #{record.inventoryId,jdbcType=BIGINT}, supplier_code = #{record.supplierCode,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, prod_country = #{record.prodCountry,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, imp_date = #{record.impDate,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, opt_code = #{record.optCode,jdbcType=CHAR}, order_type = #{record.orderType,jdbcType=SMALLINT}, warehouse_code = #{record.warehouseCode,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, case_no = #{record.caseNo,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, imp_type = #{record.impType,jdbcType=SMALLINT}, remark = #{record.remark,jdbcType=NVARCHAR}, rohs = #{record.rohs,jdbcType=CHAR}, create_time = #{record.createTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, update_time = #{record.updateTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, create_user = #{record.createUser,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, update_user = #{record.updateUser,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, oversea_invoice_no = #{record.overseaInvoiceNo,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, poNo = #{record.pono,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, poItemNo = #{record.poitemno,jdbcType=INTEGER}

update dbo.impdata
invoice_id = #{invoiceId,jdbcType=BIGINT},
invoice_no = #{invoiceNo,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
order_no = #{orderNo,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
model_no = #{modelNo,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
quantity = #{quantity,jdbcType=INTEGER},
barcode = #{barcode,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
customer_no = #{customerNo,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
inventory_id = #{inventoryId,jdbcType=BIGINT},
supplier_code = #{supplierCode,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
prod_country = #{prodCountry,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
imp_date = #{impDate,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP},
opt_code = #{optCode,jdbcType=CHAR},
order_type = #{orderType,jdbcType=SMALLINT},

oversea_invoice_no = #{overseaInvoiceNo,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
poNo = #{pono,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
poItemNo = #{poitemno,jdbcType=INTEGER},
where id = #{id,jdbcType=BIGINT}

update dbo.impdata set invoice_id = #{invoiceId,jdbcType=BIGINT}, invoice_no = #{invoiceNo,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, order_no = #{orderNo,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, model_no = #{modelNo,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, quantity = #{quantity,jdbcType=INTEGER}, barcode = #{barcode,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, customer_no = #{customerNo,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, inventory_id = #{inventoryId,jdbcType=BIGINT}, supplier_code = #{supplierCode,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, prod_country = #{prodCountry,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, imp_date = #{impDate,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, opt_code = #{optCode,jdbcType=CHAR}, order_type = #{orderType,jdbcType=SMALLINT}, warehouse_code = #{warehouseCode,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, case_no = #{caseNo,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, imp_type = #{impType,jdbcType=SMALLINT}, remark = #{remark,jdbcType=NVARCHAR}, rohs = #{rohs,jdbcType=CHAR}, create_time = #{createTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, update_time = #{updateTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, create_user = #{createUser,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, update_user = #{updateUser,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, oversea_invoice_no = #{overseaInvoiceNo,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, poNo = #{pono,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, poItemNo = #{poitemno,jdbcType=INTEGER} where id = #{id,jdbcType=BIGINT}
